emails.subject: Re: Osborn Purchase
emails.body: Re: Osborn Purchase Dan Hyvl will call Gary Lamphier with the meter number. This should go in the system as soon as we get the meter number form Dan Hyvl. We can put this deal in the system before the contracts are signed, but we do not want to send the Osborn until we have a signed agreement from ENTEX. Also, do not pay Osborn until we recieve an allocation statement. Thanks, J Enron North America Corp. From: Megan Parker ENRON 10/27/2000 10:22 AM

emails.subject: Re: Osborn Purchase
emails.body: Re: Osborn Purchase Dan Hyvl will call Gary Lamphier with the meter number. This should go in the system as soon as we get the meter number form Dan Hyvl. We can put this deal in the system before the contracts are signed, but we do not want to send the Osborn until we have a signed agreement from ENTEX. Also, do not pay Osborn until we recieve an allocation statement. Thanks, J Enron North America Corp. From: Megan Parker ENRON 10/27/2000 10:22 AM

emails.subject: Re: Osborn Purchase
emails.body: Re: Osborn Purchase We have the allocation statement and the invoice from Osborn, so I will wait to hear from you about the ENTEX contract before I pay. With the deal already in the system, I will be able to get the check out the next day. Megan
